RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, LESTER S. DBA GOLDEN GATE CHILDREN'S HOM
